hibernate-mapping.sql-query: INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestCore ( RequestStatus , ReceiptDate , StatusReason, CompletedDate, StatusChanged, ReqPassword, ROI_Reason, RequestReasonAttribute, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq ) VALUES (:status, :receiptDate, :statusReason, :completedDate, :statusChangedDt, :requestPassword, :requestReason, :requestReasonAttribute, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor ( ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_Requestor_Seq, RequestorType, RequestorTypeName, WorkPhone, HomePhone, CellPhone, ContactName, ContactPhone, Fax, NameFirst, NameMiddle, nameLast, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq) VALUES (:requestId, :requestorSeq, :requestorType, :requestorTypeName, :workPhone, :homePhone, :cellPhone, :contactName, :contactPhone, :fax, :firstName, :middleName, :lastName, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

SELECT TOP 1 req.ROI_RequestCore_Seq id, req.RequestStatus status, req.receiptDate receiptDate, req.statusReason statusReason, req.ROI_Reason requestReason, req.RequestReasonAttribute requestReasonAttribute, req.StatusChanged statusChangedDt, req.ReqPassword requestPassword,
(SELECT COUNT(ROI_RequestCore_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDelivery WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = req.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) releaseCount,
coalesce((SELECT TOP 1 coreCharge.DisplayBillingInfo FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreCharges coreCharge WHERE coreCharge.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = req.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ORDER BY coreCharge.Created_Dt DESC), 0) hasDraftRelease,
COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Invoice_Balance_Due) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv WHERE inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = req.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqCore.Release_Cost) FROM ROI_RequestCoreCharges reqCore WHERE reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = req.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0) balanceDue,
req.AuthDoc authDoc, req.AuthDocName authDocName, req.AuthDocSubtitle authDocSubtitle, req.AuthDocDatetime authDocDateTime, req.ConversionSource conversionSource, COALESCE(req.Unbillable, 1) unbillable,
req.Created_Dt createdDate, req.Created_By_Seq createdBy, req.Modified_Dt modifiedDate, req.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, RTRIM(COALESCE((select u.FullName from USERS u where u.UserInstanceId = req.Modified_By_Seq), 'Deleted User - ' + CAST(req.Modified_By_Seq AS varchar(256)))) modifiedByUser FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCore req WHERE req.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

SELECT TOP 1 ROI_RequestCoreRequestor_Seq id, ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorSeq, RequestorType requestorType, RequestorTypeName requestorTypeName, WorkPhone workPhone, HomePhone HomePhone, CellPhone cellPhone, ContactName contactName, ContactPhone contactPhone, Fax fax, NameFirst firstName, NameMiddle middleName, nameLast lastName, suffix suffix, Created_Dt createdDate, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDate, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

SELECT requestor.ROI_RequestCoreRequestor_Seq id, requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorSeq, requestor.RequestorType requestorType, requestor.RequestorTypeName requestorTypeName, requestor.WorkPhone workPhone, requestor.HomePhone HomePhone, requestor.CellPhone cellPhone, requestor.ContactName contactName, requestor.ContactPhone contactPhone, requestor.Fax fax, requestor.NameFirst firstName, requestor.NameMiddle middleName, requestor.nameLast lastName, requestor.suffix suffix, requestor.Created_Dt createdDate, requestor.Created_By_Seq createdBy, requestor.Modified_Dt modifiedDate, requestor.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :invoiceIds )

DELETE p FROM cabinet..ROI_Pages p, cabinet..ROI_Versions v, cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS d, cabinet..ROI_patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and RcP.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and d.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and v.ROI_Documents_Seq = d.ROI_Documents_Seq and p.ROI_versions_Seq = v. ROI_versions_Seq

DELETE v FROM cabinet..ROI_Versions v, cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS d, cabinet..ROI_patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and RcP.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and d.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and v.ROI_Documents_Seq = d.ROI_Documents_Seq

DELETE d FROM cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS d, cabinet..ROI_patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and RcP.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and d.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq

DELETE e FROM cabinet..ROI_Encounters e, cabinet..ROI_patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and RcP.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and e.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq

DELETE attachment FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore attachment, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and attachment.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = RcP.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq

DELETE attachment FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore attachment, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and attachment.ROI_Patients_Seq = RcP.ROI_Patients_Seq

DELETE document FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore document, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and document.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = RcP.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq

DELETE document FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore document, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and document.ROI_Patients_Seq = RcP.ROI_Patients_Seq
DELETE RcP FROM cabinet..ROI_patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and RcP.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq

DELETE pat FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and RcP.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = pat.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq
DELETE RcP FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
DELETE RcP FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore RcP WHERE RcP.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq= :requestId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCore WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreEvent WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCore SET RequestStatus = :requestStatus , ReceiptDate = :receiptDate, StatusReason = :statusReason, ROI_Reason = :requestReason, RequestReasonAttribute = :requestReasonAttribute, CompletedDate = :completedDate, StatusChanged = :statusChangedDt, ReqPassword = :requestPassword,
Modified_Dt = :modifiedDate, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBy WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor SET ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorSeq, RequestorType = :requestorType, RequestorTypeName = :requestorTypeName, WorkPhone = :workPhone, HomePhone = :homePhone, CellPhone = :cellPhone, ContactName = :contactName, ContactPhone = :contactPhone, Fax = :fax, NameFirst = :firstName, NameMiddle = :middleName, nameLast = :lastName, suffix = :suffix, Modified_Dt = :modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedSeq WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

SELECT distinct requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, requestCore.ReceiptDate receiptDate, requestCore.RequestStatus requestStatus, requestCore.AuthDocSubtitle subtitle, requestCore.Modified_Dt lastUpdated, coalesce((SELECT RTRIM(LTRIM(u.FullName)) from USERS u WHERE u.UserInstanceId = requestCore.Modified_By_Seq), 'Deleted User -' + cast(requestCore.Modified_By_Seq as varchar(20))) updatedBy,
cast((SELECT (coalesce(requestor.NameLast, '') + ' ' + coalesce(requestor.NameMiddle, '') + ' ' + coalesce(requestor.NameFirst, '')) FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) AS varchar(256)) requestorName,
cast((SELECT requestor.RequestorTypeName FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) AS varchar(256)) requestorTypeName,
coalesce((SELECT requestor.RequestorType FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0) requestorType,
CAST((Select STUFF((SELECT ', ~@~' + RTRIM(LTRIM(patient.NAME)) FROM ((SELECT pat.NAME NAME FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) UNION ALL (SELECT (case when pat.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else pat.LASTNAME end + case when pat.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when pat.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + pat.FIRSTNAME end) NAME FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq)) as patient FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 5, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) patientsString, CAST((Select STUFF((SELECT ',' + RTRIM(LTRIM(patient.FACILITY)) FROM ((SELECT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) UNION ALL (SELECT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq)) as patient FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 1, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) facility, CAST((select (SELECT count(pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE pat.LOCKOUT = '1' AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) + (SELECT count(pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND pat.patientLocked = '1')) AS bit) patientLocked, CAST((select (SELECT count(pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE pat.VIP = '1' AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) + (SELECT count(pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND pat.VIP = '1')) AS bit) vip,
COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Invoice_Balance_Due) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqCore.Release_Cost) FROM ROI_RequestCoreCharges reqCore WHERE reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0) balance, null encounterString
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCore requestCore

SELECT distinct requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, requestCore.ReceiptDate receiptDate, requestCore.RequestStatus requestStatus, requestCore.AuthDocSubtitle subtitle, requestCore.Modified_Dt lastUpdated, coalesce((SELECT RTRIM(LTRIM(u.FullName)) from USERS u WHERE u.UserInstanceId = requestCore.Modified_By_Seq), 'Deleted User -' + cast(requestCore.Modified_By_Seq as varchar(20))) updatedBy,
cast((SELECT (coalesce(requestor.NameLast, '') + ' ' + coalesce(requestor.NameMiddle, '') + ' ' + coalesce(requestor.NameFirst, '')) FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) AS varchar(256)) requestorName,
cast((SELECT requestor.RequestorTypeName FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) AS varchar(256)) requestorTypeName,
coalesce((SELECT requestor.RequestorType FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0) requestorType,
CAST((Select STUFF((SELECT ', ~@~' + RTRIM(LTRIM(patient.NAME)) FROM ((SELECT pat.NAME NAME FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) UNION ALL (SELECT (case when pat.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else pat.LASTNAME end + case when pat.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when pat.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + pat.FIRSTNAME end) NAME FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq)) as patient FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 5, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) patientsString, CAST((Select STUFF((SELECT ',' + RTRIM(LTRIM(patient.FACILITY)) FROM ((SELECT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) UNION ALL (SELECT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq)) as patient FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 1, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) facility, CAST((select (SELECT count(pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE pat.LOCKOUT = '1' AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) + (SELECT count(pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND pat.patientLocked = '1')) AS bit) patientLocked, CAST((select (SELECT count(pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE pat.VIP = '1' AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) + (SELECT count(pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND pat.VIP = '1')) AS bit) vip, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Invoice_Balance_Due) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqCore.Release_Cost) FROM ROI_RequestCoreCharges reqCore WHERE reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0) balance,
CAST((SELECT STUFF((SELECT ', ~@~' + RTRIM(LTRIM(encounters.ENCOUNTER)) FROM (SELECT encounters.ENCOUNTER ENCOUNTER FROM ROI_ENCOUNTERS encounters, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = encounters.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq UNION SELECT attachment.ENCOUNTER ENCOUNTER FROM ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore attachment, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = attachment.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq UNION SELECT attachment.ENCOUNTER ENCOUNTER FROM ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore attachment, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = attachment.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq UNION SELECT document.ENCOUNTER ENCOUNTER FROM ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore document, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = document.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq UNION SELECT document.ENCOUNTER ENCOUNTER FROM ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore document, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = document.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) as encounters FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 5, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) encounterString
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCore requestCore
SELECT distinct request.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCore request
SELECT distinct request.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCore request

SELECT document.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument_Seq id, document.Amount amount, document.Copies copies, document.BillingTierName billingTierName, document.Pages pages, document.BillingTierId billingtierId, document.isElectronic isElectronic, document.RemoveBasecharge removeBaseCharge, document.Has_Salestax hasSalesTax, document.Salestax_Amount salesTaxAmount, document.ReleaseCount releaseCount FROM ROI_RequestCoreDelivery delivery, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument document WHERE delivery.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND document.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = (SELECT MAX(c.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliverytoROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges c WHERE c.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq = delivery.ROI_RequestCoreDelivery_Seq)

SELECT invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, 'Invoice ' + CAST(invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as varchar) as description, 'Invoice' invoiceType, invoice.Base_Charge charge, invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due as balance, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay WHERE reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) paymentAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj WHERE reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) adjustmentAmount, null paymentDescription, null paymentMethod, invoice.Unbillable unbillable, invoice.Unbillable_Amount unbillableAmount, invoice.Created_Dt createdDt, invoice.Created_By_Seq createdBy, invoice.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, invoice.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, invoice.Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice' AND invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due > 0
UPDATE ROI_RequestCore SET Unbillable = :unbillable, Modified_Dt = :modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBy WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreId

SELECT facility,userName,requestorType,billable,createDate,reqID,pageType,patientName, mrn, reqIdCount, sum(pages) pages
from ( (-- HPF patients hpf Documents SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, '' requestorType, '' billable, null createDate, '' reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, '' pageType, COUNT(distinct page.ROI_Pages_Seq) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr,ROI_ENCOUNTERS enc, ROI_Pages page, ROI_Versions version, ROI_Documents document,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and enc.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND document.ROI_Encounters_Seq = enc.ROI_Encounters_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq and page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ) union all (-- ROI Patients Non-Hpf Documents SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, '' requestorType, '' billable, null createDate, '' reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, '' pageType, SUM(nonHpfDocument.PAGECOUNT) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, USERS usr, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore requestSupplementalPatient, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore supplementalPatient, ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore nonHpfDocument,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = supplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and nonHpfDocument.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ) union all (-- HPF patients Non-HPF documents SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, '' requestorType, '' billable, null createDate, '' reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, '' pageType, SUM(CAST(nonHpfDocument.PAGECOUNT as INT)) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore nonHpfDocument ,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and nonHpfDocument.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ) union all (-- HPF Patients Attachments SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, '' requestorType, '' billable, null createDate, '' reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, '' pageType, SUM(CAST(suppCore.PAGECOUNT as INT)) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore suppCore,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and suppCore.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ) union all (-- Non HPF Patients Attachments SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcdc.FACILITY_NAME facility, '' requestorType, '' billable, null createDate, '' reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, '' pageType, COUNT(suppCore.PAGECOUNT) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore reqCorePat, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore suppCore WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcdc.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <= :toDate and rcdc.Type = 'Invoice' and suppCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq GROUP BY rcdc.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ) union all ( -- hpf patients global documents SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, '' requestorType, '' billable, null createDate, '' reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, '' pageType, COUNT(distinct page.ROI_Pages_Seq) pages FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat,ROI_Documents document,ROI_Versions version, ROI_Pages page, USERS usr,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.Fullname in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <= :toDate and document.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq and page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ) ) as temp group by facility,UserName,requestorType,billable,createDate,reqID,pageType,patientName, mrn,reqIdCount

SELECT facility,userName,requestorType,patientName,reqID,SUM(pages) pages,mrn,billable,createDate,pageType, Count(distinct reqIDValue) reqIDCount
from ( (-- HPF patients hpf Documents SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, '' patientName, '' reqID, '' mrn, null createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, COUNT(distinct page.ROI_Pages_Seq) pages, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqIDValue FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr,ROI_ENCOUNTERS enc, ROI_Pages page, ROI_Versions version, ROI_Documents document,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and enc.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND document.ROI_Encounters_Seq = enc.ROI_Encounters_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq and page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name ,reqCore.Unbillable,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
) union all (-- ROI Patients Non-Hpf Documents SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, '' patientName, '' reqID, '' mrn, null createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, SUM(nonHpfDocument.PAGECOUNT) pages, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqIDValue
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, USERS usr, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore requestSupplementalPatient, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore supplementalPatient, ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore nonHpfDocument,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = supplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and nonHpfDocument.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name ,reqCore.Unbillable,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
) union all (-- HPF patients Non-HPF documents SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, '' patientName, '' reqID, '' mrn, null createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, SUM(CAST(nonHpfDocument.PAGECOUNT as INT)) pages, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqIDValue
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore nonHpfDocument ,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and nonHpfDocument.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name ,reqCore.Unbillable,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
) union all (-- HPF Patients Attachments SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, '' patientName, '' reqID, '' mrn, null createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, SUM(CAST(suppCore.PAGECOUNT as INT)) pages, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqIDValue
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore suppCore,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and suppCore.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name,reqCore.Unbillable,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ) union all (-- NON HPF Patients Attachments SELECT rcdc.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, '' patientName, '' reqID, '' mrn, null createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, COUNT( suppCore.PAGECOUNT) pages, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqIDValue
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore reqCorePat, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore suppCore WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcdc.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <= :toDate and rcdc.Type = 'Invoice' and suppCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq GROUP BY rcdc.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name,reqCore.Unbillable,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq )
union all ( -- hpf patients global documents SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, '' patientName, '' reqID, '' mrn, null createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, COUNT(distinct page.ROI_Pages_Seq) pages, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqIDValue FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat,ROI_Documents document,ROI_Versions version, ROI_Pages page, USERS usr,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.Fullname in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <= :toDate and document.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq and page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name ,reqCore.Unbillable,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ) ) as temp group by facility,userName,requestorType,patientName,reqID,mrn,billable,createDate,pageType

SELECT facility,userName,requestorType,billable,createDate,reqID,pageType,patientName, mrn, reqIdCount, sum(pages) pages
from ( (-- HPF patients hpf Documents SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, reqType.Name requestorType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, 'MPF' pageType, COUNT(distinct page.ROI_Pages_Seq) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, USERS usr,ROI_ENCOUNTERS enc, ROI_PATIENTS pat, ROI_Pages page, ROI_Versions version, ROI_Documents document,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.Fullname in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and enc.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND document.ROI_Encounters_Seq = enc.ROI_Encounters_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq and page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name ,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
) union all (-- ROI Patients Non-Hpf Documents SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, reqType.Name requestorType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, 'NON-MPF' pageType, SUM(nonHpfDocument.PAGECOUNT) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, USERS usr, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore requestSupplementalPatient, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore supplementalPatient, ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore nonHpfDocument, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.Fullname in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = supplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and nonHpfDocument.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name ,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
) union all (-- HPF patients Non-HPF documents SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, reqType.Name requestorType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, 'NON-MPF' pageType, SUM(cast (nonHpfDocument.PAGECOUNT as int)) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore nonHpfDocument, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.Fullname in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and nonHpfDocument.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name ,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
) union all (-- HPF Patients Attachments SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, reqType.Name requestorType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, 'Attachment' pageType, sum(Cast (suppCore.PAGECOUNT as int)) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore suppCore, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.Fullname in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and suppCore.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq ) union all (-- Non HPF Patients Attachments SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcdc.FACILITY_NAME facility, reqType.Name requestorType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, 'Attachment' pageType, COUNT(suppCore.PAGECOUNT) pages
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore reqCorePat, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore suppCore WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcdc.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <= :toDate and rcdc.Type = 'Invoice' and suppCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq GROUP BY rcdc.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME,reqType.Name,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq )
union all ( -- hpf patients global documents SELECT usr.FullName userName, rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, reqType.Name requestorType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, '' patientName, '' mrn, 0 reqIdCount, 'MPF' pageType, COUNT(distinct page.ROI_Pages_Seq) pages FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat,ROI_Documents document,ROI_Versions version, ROI_Pages page, USERS usr,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.Fullname in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <= :toDate and document.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq and page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME, usr.fullNAME ,reqType.Name ,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
)
) as temp group by facility,UserName,requestorType,billable,createDate,reqID,pageType,patientName, mrn,reqIdCount

SELECT facility,userName,requestorType,patientName,reqID,SUM(pages) pages,mrn,billable,createDate,pageType, reqIDCount
from ( (-- HPF patients hpf Documents SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, pat.NAME patientName, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, pat.MRN mrn, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, COUNT(distinct page.ROI_Pages_Seq) pages, 0 reqIDCount FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr,ROI_ENCOUNTERS enc, ROI_Pages page, ROI_Versions version, ROI_Documents document,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.Fullname in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and enc.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND document.ROI_Encounters_Seq = enc.ROI_Encounters_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq and page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME,usr.FullName,reqType.Name,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,pat.MRN, pat.NAME,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt
) union all (-- ROI Patients Non-Hpf Documents SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, supplementalPatient.LASTNAME + ',' + supplementalPatient.FIRSTNAME patientName, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, supplementalPatient.MRN mrn, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, SUM(nonHpfDocument.PAGECOUNT) pages, 0 reqIDCount
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, USERS usr, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore requestSupplementalPatient, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore supplementalPatient, ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore nonHpfDocument,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = supplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and nonHpfDocument.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and requestSupplementalPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME,usr.FullName,reqType.Name,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq, supplementalPatient.LASTNAME , supplementalPatient.FIRSTNAME,supplementalPatient.MRN, reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt
) union all (-- HPF patients Non-HPF documents SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, pat.NAME patientName, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, pat.MRN mrn, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, SUM(CAST(nonHpfDocument.PAGECOUNT as INT)) pages, 0 reqIDCount
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore nonHpfDocument ,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and nonHpfDocument.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME,usr.FullName,reqType.Name,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,pat.MRN, pat.NAME,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt
) union all (-- HPF Patients Attachments SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, pat.NAME patientName, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, pat.MRN mrn, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, SUM(CAST(suppCore.PAGECOUNT as INT)) pages, 0 reqIDCount
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore suppCore ,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <=:toDate and suppCore.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME,usr.FullName,reqType.Name,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,pat.MRN, pat.NAME,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt ) union all (-- Non HPF patient Attachments SELECT rcdc.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, pat.LASTNAME + ',' + pat.FIRSTNAME patientName, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, pat.MRN mrn, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, COUNT(suppCore.PAGECOUNT) pages, 0 reqIDCount
FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcdc, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore reqCorePat, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, USERS usr, ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore suppCore WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcdc.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.FullName in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <= :toDate and rcdc.Type = 'Invoice' and suppCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq GROUP BY rcdc.FACILITY_NAME,usr.FullName,reqType.Name,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,pat.MRN, pat.LASTNAME,pat.firstname,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt )
union all ( -- hpf patients global documents SELECT rcd.FACILITY_NAME facility, usr.FullName userName, reqType.Name requestorType, pat.NAME patientName, reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq reqID, pat.MRN mrn, reqCore.Created_Dt createDate, '' pageType, reqCore.Unbillable billable, COUNT(distinct page.ROI_Pages_Seq) pages, 0 reqIDCount FROM ROI_Requestor req, ROI_RequestorType reqType, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor reqCoreReq, ROI_RequestCore reqCore, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients reqCorePat, ROI_PATIENTS pat,ROI_Documents document,ROI_Versions version, ROI_Pages page, USERS usr,ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rcd
WHERE reqType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = req.ROI_RequestorType_Seq and req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_Requestor_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCorePat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCorePat.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = reqCoreReq.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and reqCore.RequestStatus = 'Completed' and rcd.FACILITY_NAME in (:facility) and usr.Fullname in (:userName) and usr.UserInstanceId = reqCoreReq.Modified_By_Seq and reqType.Name in (:requestorType) and reqCore.Created_Dt >= :fromDate and reqCore.Created_Dt <= :toDate and document.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq and page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq and rcd.Type = 'Invoice' and reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rcd.ROI_RequestCore_Seq
GROUP BY rcd.FACILITY_NAME,usr.FullName,reqType.Name,reqCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq,pat.MRN, pat.NAME,reqCore.Unbillable, reqCore.Created_Dt )
) as temp group by facility,userName,requestorType,patientName,reqID,mrn,billable,createDate,pageType,reqIDCount
